<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-sĭng]][[de:Wasser-Affe]][[fr:Singe d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-sṳ̂n]][[ja:壬申]][[ko:임신 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Aap]][[vi:Nhâm Thân]][[za:Nyaemzsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sin]][[zh-yue:壬申]][[zh:壬申]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-sĭng]][[de:Wasser-Affe]][[fr:Singe d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-sṳ̂n]][[ja:壬申]][[ko:임신 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Aap]][[vi:Nhâm Thân]][[za:Nyaemzsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sin]][[zh-yue:壬申]][[zh:壬申]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Wateraap (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-sĭng]][[de:Wasser-Affe]][[fr:Singe d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-sṳ̂n]][[ja:壬申]][[ko:임신 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Aap]][[vi:Nhâm Thân]][[za:Nyaemzsaen]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sin]][[zh-yue:壬申]][[zh:壬申]]
[[Category:qq]]
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Water Monkey|kanji=壬申|romaji=mizunoe saru|onyomi=jinshin|p=rénshēn|w=jen-shen|mi=ʐən³⁵ ʂən⁵³|y=jam4 san1|j=jam4 san1|ci=jɐm sɐn¹|mc=ɲiɪm ʂin|oc-bs=ɲɨm ʂin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
{{中華圏の事物
|タイトル = 壬申
|File種別 = 
|File = 
|Fileの説明 = 
|繁体字 = 壬申
|簡体字 = 壬申
|ピン音 = rénshēn
|通用ピン音 = 
|注音符号 = ㄖㄣˊㄕㄣ
|ラテン字 = 
|カタカナ = レンシェーン
|漢音読み = じんしん
|慣用読み = みずのえさる<br>じんすいのさる
|ひらがな = 
|韓国語 = 임신 
|ベトナム語 = {{Unicode|Nhâm Thân|qq=}}
}}
'''Yang Water Monkey''' is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 9th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Xinwei|ja|1=Yin Metal Goat|2=ja|辛未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinwei|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Guiyou|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guiyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ren|ja|壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|lt=Mizunoe (壬)|2=ja|3=壬|4=zh|5=壬|1=Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ren|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoe (壬)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Water|13=User:Immanuelle/Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|qq=}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|WD=Q740674|lt=Monkey (申)|1=Monkey (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a generating relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal generates Water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Monkey (壬申)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénshēn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-saru
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-saru
***Onyomi 1: jinshin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imsinn (임신)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thân

<!--
==
* Yang Water Monkey (壬申) 
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénshēn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのえさる (mizu-no-e-saru)
***Onyomi: じんすいのさる (jinsui-no-saru)
***Onyomi: じんしん (jinshin)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): imsin
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Thân

-->
==Years of Yang Water Monkey==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 12 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Water Monkey (壬申)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|WD=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|WD=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|WD=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 12|en|AD 12|WD=Q23378|lt=12 AD|1=AD 12}}
* {{ill|AD 72|en|AD 72|WD=Q30404|lt=72 AD|1=AD 72}}
* {{ill|AD 132|en|AD 132|WD=Q33099|lt=132 AD|1=AD 132}}
* {{ill|192|en|192|WD=Q30336|lt=192 AD|1=192}}
* {{ill|252|en|252|WD=Q33804|lt=252 AD|1=252}}
* {{ill|312|en|312|WD=Q32042|lt=312 AD|1=312}}
* {{ill|372|en|372|WD=Q34567|lt=372 AD|1=372}}
* {{ill|432|en|432|WD=Q30734|lt=432 AD|1=432}}
* {{ill|492|en|492|WD=Q31686|lt=492 AD|1=492}}
* {{ill|552|en|552|WD=Q25266|lt=552 AD|1=552}}
* {{ill|612|en|612|WD=Q31770|lt=612 AD|1=612}}
* {{ill|672|en|672|WD=Q30601|lt=672 AD|1=672}}
* {{ill|732|en|732|WD=Q23569|lt=732 AD|1=732}}
* {{ill|792|en|792|WD=Q31116|lt=792 AD|1=792}}
* {{ill|852|en|852|WD=Q30383|lt=852 AD|1=852}}
* {{ill|912|en|912|WD=Q23837|lt=912 AD|1=912}}
* {{ill|972|en|972|WD=Q23575|lt=972 AD|1=972}}
|
* {{ill|1032|en|1032|WD=Q19318|lt=1032 AD|1=1032}}
* {{ill|1092|en|1092|WD=Q19472|lt=1092 AD|1=1092}}
* {{ill|1152|en|1152|WD=Q19645|lt=1152 AD|1=1152}}
* {{ill|1212|en|1212|WD=Q5255|lt=1212 AD|1=1212}}
* {{ill|1272|en|1272|WD=Q5524|lt=1272 AD|1=1272}}
* {{ill|1332|en|1332|WD=Q6001|lt=1332 AD|1=1332}}
* {{ill|1392|en|1392|WD=Q6382|lt=1392 AD|1=1392}}
* {{ill|1452|en|1452|WD=Q6460|lt=1452 AD|1=1452}}
* {{ill|1512|en|1512|WD=Q6192|lt=1512 AD|1=1512}}
* {{ill|1572|en|1572|WD=Q6670|lt=1572 AD|1=1572}}
* {{ill|1632|en|1632|WD=Q6865|lt=1632 AD|1=1632}}
* {{ill|1692|en|1692|WD=Q7685|lt=1692 AD|1=1692}}
* {{ill|1752|en|1752|WD=Q7618|lt=1752 AD|1=1752}}
* {{ill|1812|en|1812|WD=Q6933|lt=1812 AD|1=1812}}
* {{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872 AD|1=1872}}
* {{ill|1932|en|1932|WD=Q18743|lt=1932 AD|1=1932}}
* {{ill|1992|en|1992|WD=Q2060|lt=1992 AD|1=1992}}
|
* {{ill|2052 AD|ja|2052年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2052|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2052 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2112 AD|ja|2112年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2112|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2112 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2172 AD|ja|2172年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2172|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2172 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|WD=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2232 AD|ja|2232年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2232|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2232 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2292 AD|ja|2292年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2292|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2292 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|WD=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2352 AD|ja|2352年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2352|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2352 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2412 AD|ja|2412年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2412|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2412 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2472 AD|ja|2472年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2472|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2472 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2532 AD|ja|2532年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2532|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2532 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2592 AD|ja|2592年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2592|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2592 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2652 AD|ja|2652年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2652|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2652 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2712 AD|ja|2712年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2712|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2712 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2772 AD|ja|2772年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2772|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2772 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2832 AD|ja|2832年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2832|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2832 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2892 AD|ja|2892年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2892|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2892 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2952 AD|ja|2952年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2952|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2952 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

===Events===
* {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|WD=Q314802|lt=Emperor Tenji|1=Emperor Tenji}} 11th year  ({{ill|672|en|672|WD=Q30601|lt=672 AD|1=672}}) – {{ill|Jinshin War|en|Jinshin War|WD=Q2378252|lt=Renjin Rebellion|1=Jinshin War}}.
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5 ({{ill|1872|en|1872|WD=Q7753|lt=1872 AD|1=1872}}), the family register compiled at that time was called the {{ill|Renjin Family Register|ja|壬申戸籍|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin Family Register|1=jinshin koseki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11429522}}.

==Months of Yang Water Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|WD=Q121|lt=July|1=July}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|WD=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.

==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}===
The day of {{ill|Renjin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renjin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 3rd day of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

==Yang Water Monkey (壬申時==
It refers to the period from 16:00 to 18:00.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

[[zh-min-nan:Lîm-chin]]
[[zh-yue:壬申]]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Water Monkey|qq=ja|壬申|version=98658267|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[cdo:Yîm-cṳ̄de]]
[[nds:Wasser-Affenvi]]
[[de:Yang Water Monkey]]

[[ja:壬申]]
[[zh:壬申]]
[[ko:임신 (간지)]]
[[fr:Singe de eau]]
[[de:Wasser-Affe]]

[[af:Wateraap (astrologie)]]
[[de:Wasser-Affeneen]]
[[en:Water Monkey]]
[[fr:Singe de eauboishak]]
[[it:Yim-chṳ́id]]

[[vi:Nhâm Thân]]
[[za:Yimceij]]
[[ar:Yang Water Monkey]]

<!--Yang Water Monkey--><!--Yang Water Monkey-->

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Ìng-sĭng]]
[[fr:Singe d'eau]]
[[hak:Ngìm-sṳ̂n]]
[[nds:Water-Aap]]
[[za:Nyaemzsaen]]
[[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sin]]
[[zh-yue:壬申]]
<!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[cdo:Ìng-sĭng]]
[[fr:Singe d'eau]]
[[hak:Ngìm-sṳ̂n]]
[[nds:Water-Aap]]
[[za:Nyaemzsaen]]
[[zh-min-nan:Jîm-sin]]
[[zh-yue:壬申]]
{{wikidata link|Q1062030}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
